short_text: Kumara to Scholtz, Scholtz Run Out!! Namibia have been shot down for 96! A misfield by Kumara and that has resulted in a
full_text: Kumara to Scholtz, Scholtz Run Out!! Namibia have been shot down for 96! A misfield by Kumara and that has resulted in a run-out. Was a full toss by the bowler and Scholtz guided it down the pitch. Kumara gets his hands to it, but fails to grab it, parrying it away to his right. But Nissanka is quick to get there, grab it and have an underarm direct-hit at the bowler's end. Scholtz wanted Smit to get back on strike, but he has perished in the end.

short_text: Kumara to Scholtz, no run, on a length around off, shapes away and Scholtz gets beaten
full_text: Kumara to Scholtz, no run, on a length around off, shapes away and Scholtz gets beaten

short_text: Kumara to Pikky Ya France, Bowled!! Right into the blockhole and the batsman is too late to bring his bat down. The midd
full_text: Kumara to Pikky Ya France, Bowled!! Right into the blockhole and the batsman is too late to bring his bat down. The middle stump goes for a walk as Namibia are nine down! Kumara looks set to finish things off, has five balls to knockout Namibia below 100.

short_text: Chameera to Smit, 2 runs, width on offer and Smit smashes it to Shanaka at cover, but he fails to grab it. Will go down
full_text: Chameera to Smit, 2 runs, width on offer and Smit smashes it to Shanaka at cover, but he fails to grab it. Will go down as a , was a really difficult one though..

short_text: Chameera to Smit, no run, goes full does the bowler and Smit drives the half-volley to mid-off
full_text: Chameera to Smit, no run, goes full does the bowler and Smit drives the half-volley to mid-off

short_text: Chameera to Pikky Ya France, 1 run, full and quick on middle and leg, Pikky Ya France squeezes it to mid-on for a single
full_text: Chameera to Pikky Ya France, 1 run, full and quick on middle and leg, Pikky Ya France squeezes it to mid-on for a single

short_text: Chameera to Ruben Trumpelmann, Caught by Shanaka!! Wow! What a superb catch by Shanaka that! For a moment it seemed as i
full_text: Chameera to Ruben Trumpelmann, Caught by Shanaka!! Wow! What a superb catch by Shanaka that! For a moment it seemed as if this will drop in front of the fielder at cover but the Sri Lankan skipper moves across in a flash and puts in a slide to grab this with his right hand. Was a short ball that hurried up the batsman who got a top-edge on his flat-batted shot. Namibia in danger of getting bowled out within 20 overs.

short_text: Chameera to Ruben Trumpelmann, no run, 139kph, sharp and quick on off, Ruben Trumpelmann goes for a pull and gets a top-
full_text: Chameera to Ruben Trumpelmann, no run, 139kph, sharp and quick on off, Ruben Trumpelmann goes for a pull and gets a top-edge that drops in front of point where the fielder was charging in to grab it

short_text: Chameera to Smit, 1 run, back of a length around off, Smit knocks this into the pocket at covers for a single
full_text: Chameera to Smit, 1 run, back of a length around off, Smit knocks this into the pocket at covers for a single

short_text: Hasaranga to Smit, 1 run, end of a wily spell by Hasaranga who finishes with figures of This kept low and Smit worked it
full_text: Hasaranga to Smit, 1 run, end of a wily spell by Hasaranga who finishes with figures of This kept low and Smit worked it towards mid-wicket for a single

short_text: Hasaranga to Smit, no run, down on his knee to play the sweep as this legbreak keeps low and sneaks past his underedge
full_text: Hasaranga to Smit, no run, down on his knee to play the sweep as this legbreak keeps low and sneaks past his underedge

short_text: Hasaranga to Ruben Trumpelmann, 1 run, that kept really low as Ruben Trumpelmann worked it into the pocket at mid-wicket
full_text: Hasaranga to Ruben Trumpelmann, 1 run, that kept really low as Ruben Trumpelmann worked it into the pocket at mid-wicket

short_text: Hasaranga to Loftie-Eaton, Lbw!! Namibia are seven down as another batsman has been trapped LBW by Hasaranga tonight. We
full_text: Hasaranga to Loftie-Eaton, Lbw!! Namibia are seven down as another batsman has been trapped LBW by Hasaranga tonight. Went down on his knee to play the reverse sweep, but failed to make contact and got hit on the pads. Impact on middle and off, and it's just clipping the off-stump, confirm the replays.

short_text: Hasaranga to Smit, 1 run, played across the line as Smit gets a single towards square leg
full_text: Hasaranga to Smit, 1 run, played across the line as Smit gets a single towards square leg

short_text: Hasaranga to Smit, no run, appeal for an lbw, but the inside edge has saved the batsman. Was the googly as the inside ed
full_text: Hasaranga to Smit, no run, appeal for an lbw, but the inside edge has saved the batsman. Was the googly as the inside edge richocheted onto the batsman's pads as Smit tried to defend it

short_text: Chameera to Smit, 1 run, drifting on the pads as the batsman flicks it through mid-wicket uppishly
full_text: Chameera to Smit, 1 run, drifting on the pads as the batsman flicks it through mid-wicket uppishly

short_text: Chameera to Smit, no run, banged into the pitch by Chameera, Smit sways away from its line
full_text: Chameera to Smit, no run, banged into the pitch by Chameera, Smit sways away from its line

full_text: Chameera to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, a yorker length ball on off and Loftie-Eaton has squeezed it in front of point for a run

full_text: Chameera to Loftie-Eaton, no run, short and quick on off, Loftie-Eaton tries to slap it, mistimes it completely to cover

short_text: Chameera to Smit, 1 run, get hurried up due to the pace on this short ball and pulls it to long-on for a single. Was cle
full_text: Chameera to Smit, 1 run, get hurried up due to the pace on this short ball and pulls it to long-on for a single. Was clearly late on his shot there

short_text: Chameera to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, full and quick on off, Loftie-Eaton squeezes it towards mid-off and takes a single
full_text: Chameera to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, full and quick on off, Loftie-Eaton squeezes it towards mid-off and takes a single

short_text: M Theekshana to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, fuller one on leg and Loftie-Eaton nudges it to square leg for a single
full_text: M Theekshana to Loftie-Eaton, 1 run, fuller one on leg and Loftie-Eaton nudges it to square leg for a single

short_text: M Theekshana to Loftie-Eaton, no run, the carrom ball again, Loftie-Eaton looks to work this through the on-side, but he
full_text: M Theekshana to Loftie-Eaton, no run, the carrom ball again, Loftie-Eaton looks to work this through the on-side, but he gets beaten as the ball skids along the deck. Theekshana was up in an lbw call, but this was pitching outside leg

short_text: M Theekshana to Jan Frylinck, Bowled!! Theekshana is having a fantastic game! Think this was the carrom ball on off and
full_text: M Theekshana to Jan Frylinck, Bowled!! Theekshana is having a fantastic game! Think this was the carrom ball on off and the batsman got beaten as he tried to slog/swipe it across the line. The off-stump goes for a toss and the procession of wickets continues. Sri Lanka on top, so Smit needs to play a blinder in order to post a respectable total for the opposition.

short_text: M Theekshana to Smit, 1 run, on the shorter side and Smit has swatted this to long-on off his back foot
full_text: M Theekshana to Smit, 1 run, on the shorter side and Smit has swatted this to long-on off his back foot

full_text: M Theekshana to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, worked through mid-wicket by Jan Frylinck as the bowler goes full

short_text: M Theekshana to Jan Frylinck, no run, is that a dropped catch? Nope, it is not. Think it flicked the thigh pad before it
full_text: M Theekshana to Jan Frylinck, no run, is that a dropped catch? Nope, it is not. Think it flicked the thigh pad before it deflected to the keeper. Was a short ball as Jan Frylinck got beaten on his swipe

short_text: Karunaratne to Smit, no run, back of a length around off, Smit rides the bounce and knocks it in front of mid-off
full_text: Karunaratne to Smit, no run, back of a length around off, Smit rides the bounce and knocks it in front of mid-off

short_text: Karunaratne to Smit, 2 runs, sharp bouncer by Karunaratne. A well directed short ball and Smit gets a top-edge as he goe
full_text: Karunaratne to Smit, 2 runs, sharp bouncer by Karunaratne. A well directed short ball and Smit gets a top-edge as he goes for a pull taking his eyes off the ball. Just eludes the fielder at short fine leg and they take a couple of runs

short_text: Karunaratne to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, on the pads and it has been tickled to short fine leg by Jan Frylinck
full_text: Karunaratne to Jan Frylinck, 1 run, on the pads and it has been tickled to short fine leg by Jan Frylinck

short_text: Karunaratne to Wiese, Lbw!! Another one bites the dust! And it's the big fish - David Wiese. This shaped back in vicious
full_text: Karunaratne to Wiese, Lbw!! Another one bites the dust! And it's the big fish - David Wiese. This shaped back in viciously from a good length and Wiese had no chance to get any bat on it. Struck on the pads and the umpire reckons it would have crashed into the stumps. Smit thinks the same and hence advices his partner to not opt for the review. Umpire's call as this was just clipping the top of middle-stump.

short_text: Karunaratne to Wiese, 2 runs, 99kph, a slower delivery outside off with some width. Wiese cuts it to the left of sweeper
full_text: Karunaratne to Wiese, 2 runs, 99kph, a slower delivery outside off with some width. Wiese cuts it to the left of sweeper cover and takes two as the fielder had to put in a dive to stop this

short_text: Karunaratne to Smit, 1 run, straying on the pads as Smit nudges it through square leg for a single
full_text: Karunaratne to Smit, 1 run, straying on the pads as Smit nudges it through square leg for a single

full_text: Hasaranga to Wiese, no run, tad short on off, perhaps the googly as Wiese stands tall and punches it to cover

full_text: Hasaranga to Wiese, 2 runs, fired at the batsman's pads who works it into the pocket at mid-wicket for a couple of runs

full_text: Hasaranga to Smit, 1 run, too full on middle and leg, Smit squeezes it down to long-on for a couple of runs

short_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, Lbw!! Hasaranga was quite confident with this one and that was evident in his appeal. Was n
full_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, Lbw!! Hasaranga was quite confident with this one and that was evident in his appeal. Was nearly a celebrappeal by the leg-spinner. Craig Williams was down on his knee to play the reverse sweep, but the ball kept straight and rapped him into the pads. Impact around middle and off and it's crashing into the middle pole according to the replays.

short_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, 2 runs, good running. Shimmies down the wicket and clips this through mid-wicket with soft
full_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, 2 runs, good running. Shimmies down the wicket and clips this through mid-wicket with soft hands. Challenges the fielder's arm and comes back for two does the batsman

short_text: Hasaranga to Wiese, 1 run, works this through mid-wicket comfortably for a single
full_text: Hasaranga to Wiese, 1 run, works this through mid-wicket comfortably for a single

full_text: Kumara to Wiese, 1 run, fullish delivery outside off, Wiese drives to sweeper cover

full_text: Kumara to Wiese, no run, short ball around leg-stump, Wiese ducks inside the line and lets it pass

full_text: Kumara to Craig Williams, 1 run, back of a length angled into the hips, Williams tucks it behind square on the leg-side

short_text: Kumara to Craig Williams, no run, that's pacy. 139kph bouncer and Williams quickly gets out of the way. Smart bowling as
full_text: Kumara to Craig Williams, no run, that's pacy. 139kph bouncer and Williams quickly gets out of the way. Smart bowling as Kumara knows that Williams is itching to have a go

short_text: Kumara to Erasmus, Caught by Hasaranga!! This was coming.. The innings was going nowhere and Erasmus felt the need to in
full_text: Kumara to Erasmus, Caught by Hasaranga!! This was coming.. The innings was going nowhere and Erasmus felt the need to inject some impetus, he tries to go down town but does not get hold of the shot, it comes right off the toe-end and Hasaranga takes an easy catch near long-on.

short_text: Kumara to Erasmus, no run, very full delivery around off, Erasmus digs it out to cover
full_text: Kumara to Erasmus, no run, very full delivery around off, Erasmus digs it out to cover

short_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, , much needed hit for Williams and Namibia. He was feeling the heat and had to break the
full_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, , much needed hit for Williams and Namibia. He was feeling the heat and had to break the shackles, goes for the slog sweep and just manages to clear the deep backward square fielder

short_text: M Theekshana to Erasmus, 1 run, comes down the track and nudges it with the spin to deep midwicket
full_text: M Theekshana to Erasmus, 1 run, comes down the track and nudges it with the spin to deep midwicket

short_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, 1 run, dropped short and Williams can only pull it to deep square leg. That was there to
full_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, 1 run, dropped short and Williams can only pull it to deep square leg. That was there to be put away and Williams has missed out

full_text: M Theekshana to Erasmus, 1 run, leg-break and Erasmus lofts it inside out to sweeper cover, just a single

full_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, 1 run, comes down the track and is met by a shortened length, tucked to deep square leg

full_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, no run, Williams is feeling the pressure. He swings across the line and misses the off-break, struck on the back leg and there's an appeal for LBW, but it was turning down leg

short_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, 1 run, makes room and drives the slower ball to cover, a fumble allows the single to be t
full_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, 1 run, makes room and drives the slower ball to cover, a fumble allows the single to be taken

short_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, no run, now the change of pace and Williams does not pick it, he swings blindly and misse
full_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, no run, now the change of pace and Williams does not pick it, he swings blindly and misses it by a long way

short_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, no run, effort delivery from Karunaratne. 137kph short ball and Williams swings across th
full_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, no run, effort delivery from Karunaratne. 137kph short ball and Williams swings across the line, the ball keeps bouncing and climbs over the top-edge

short_text: Karunaratne to Erasmus, 1 run, fraction short and outside off, Erasmus cuts it towards backward point and Chandimal dive
full_text: Karunaratne to Erasmus, 1 run, fraction short and outside off, Erasmus cuts it towards backward point and Chandimal dives to his right to make a good stop, saved a few

short_text: Karunaratne to Erasmus, 2 runs, on a length and outside off, Erasmus slaps it in front of square and immediately called
full_text: Karunaratne to Erasmus, 2 runs, on a length and outside off, Erasmus slaps it in front of square and immediately called for two, easily done

short_text: Karunaratne to Erasmus, no run, Yes it carried. Short and outside off, Erasmus cracks the cut towards backward point, Ch
full_text: Karunaratne to Erasmus, no run, Yes it carried. Short and outside off, Erasmus cracks the cut towards backward point, Chandimal was walking in and was really close, had very little time to react and he could not get down to clasp his hands around it

full_text: Hasaranga to Erasmus, 1 run, straight slider and Erasmus inside halves the forward block to square leg

full_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, 1 run, shimmies down and gets close to the ball, works it to long-on

full_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, no run, googly and Williams does not pick it, pushes it off the inner half to the right of Hasaranga

full_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, no run, drifting into the right hander and Williams misses the sweep, the ball strikes the pad and rolls to the right of Perera

full_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, no run, comes down the track and pushes it to the left of Hasaranga

full_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, 2 runs, premeditated the sweep and managed to get it behind square on the leg-side, good bit of work near the boundary rope keeps it down to a brace

full_text: Kumara to Craig Williams, 1 run, very full delivery and Williams jams it out to mid-off, quick single

full_text: Kumara to Erasmus, 1 run, full and attacking the stumps, Erasmus flicks to deep square leg

short_text: Kumara to Erasmus, no run, quick bouncer around off, Erasmus ducks and allows it to fly over him. One for the over signa
full_text: Kumara to Erasmus, no run, quick bouncer around off, Erasmus ducks and allows it to fly over him. One for the over signals umpire Paul Reiffel

short_text: Kumara to Erasmus, no run, Kusal Perera was a bit hasty there. He didn't bother to consult anyone and himself asked umpi
full_text: Kumara to Erasmus, no run, Kusal Perera was a bit hasty there. He didn't bother to consult anyone and himself asked umpire Paul Reiffel to send it upstairs. Change of pace from Kumara and Erasmus was deceived by that, he prods forward to defend but the ball hits the pad first and then the bat, but as ball-tracking showed the impact was clearly outside off

short_text: Kumara to Craig Williams, 1 run, cleared the front leg to have a heave but the pace is just too quick, mistimed to long-
full_text: Kumara to Craig Williams, 1 run, cleared the front leg to have a heave but the pace is just too quick, mistimed to long-on

full_text: Kumara to Erasmus, 1 run, 147kph delivery around off-stump, Erasmus angles it down to third man

full_text: Hasaranga to Erasmus, 1 run, picked the wrong 'un and worked it with the spin to long-on

short_text: Hasaranga to Erasmus, , back to back boundaries. Hasaranga overcompensates with his length and offers a half volley outs
full_text: Hasaranga to Erasmus, , back to back boundaries. Hasaranga overcompensates with his length and offers a half volley outside off, Erasmus plays a whippy drive in front of square and beats the sweeper to the right this time

short_text: Hasaranga to Erasmus, , fraction short and around off, Erasmus waits and plays the cut late behind square on the off-sid
full_text: Hasaranga to Erasmus, , fraction short and around off, Erasmus waits and plays the cut late behind square on the off-side, the sweeper was well in front of square and he had no chance of stopping that

short_text: Hasaranga to Erasmus, no run, Smart bowling by Hasaranga. He slows up the wrong 'un and Erasmus is through the slog swee
full_text: Hasaranga to Erasmus, no run, Smart bowling by Hasaranga. He slows up the wrong 'un and Erasmus is through the slog sweep early, misses and the ball crashes into the stumps

short_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, , 1 run, tossed up around off, Williams pushes it wide of cover and Erasmus races across to
full_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, , 1 run, tossed up around off, Williams pushes it wide of cover and Erasmus races across to the striker's end. The third umpire has caught Hasaranga overstepping

short_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, no run, wrong 'un and Williams chops it back down the wicket
full_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, no run, wrong 'un and Williams chops it back down the wicket

full_text: Hasaranga to Craig Williams, no run, loud shout for LBW. Hasaranga and Kusal Perera have a chat too but decide against the review. Williams comes down the track and is beaten by the googly, struck in-line with the stumps but he was a long way out

full_text: Karunaratne to Erasmus, 2 runs, full and slanted in, Erasmus flicks it through midwicket and scampers back for the second

full_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, 1 run, short of length on off, Williams waits and steers to third man

full_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, no run, gives the charge and Karunaratne saw him coming, banged it short and outside off, Williams just watches it go past him

full_text: Karunaratne to Erasmus, 1 run, angled into the right hander and Erasmus eases it in front of long-on

short_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, 1 run, now Williams is struck on the body. Short ball and he is late on the pull shot, hi
full_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, 1 run, now Williams is struck on the body. Short ball and he is late on the pull shot, hit around the shoulder and the ball dribbles away towards third man. Might have got some bat as the umpire gives it as runs

short_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, no run, good length ball on off, Williams defends back to Karunaratne
full_text: Karunaratne to Craig Williams, no run, good length ball on off, Williams defends back to Karunaratne

full_text: M Theekshana to Erasmus, no run, quicker and at the stumps, Erasmus watchfully knocks it back to Theekshana

full_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, leg byes, 1 run, spinning down leg, Williams deflects off the pad and settles with a single

short_text: M Theekshana to Zane Green, Caught by Shanaka!! Theekshana has his second. They are not able to read him and hence the b
full_text: M Theekshana to Zane Green, Caught by Shanaka!! Theekshana has his second. They are not able to read him and hence the big shots are not coming off. Green fetches the off-break from outside off and tries it to hit it against the spin with a slog sweep, miscues it horribly and Shanaka settles under the skier near mid-on.

short_text: M Theekshana to Zane Green, no run, moved across to play the lap but almost played it onto the stumps, the ball hits the
full_text: M Theekshana to Zane Green, no run, moved across to play the lap but almost played it onto the stumps, the ball hits the back thigh and rolls to the right of Perera

full_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, 1 run, shortens the length and Williams nudges it through midwicket, for a single

short_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, , immediately Theekshana sprays one down leg, Williams lets it pass and collects the ext
full_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, , immediately Theekshana sprays one down leg, Williams lets it pass and collects the extra

short_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, , fabulous shot! That's more like it. Williams uses his feet, gets to the pitch of the b
full_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, , fabulous shot! That's more like it. Williams uses his feet, gets to the pitch of the ball and lofts it cleanly over long-off. His positive footwork allowed him play that shot

short_text: Chameera to Craig Williams, 1 run, back of a length on off, Williams drops it with soft hands into the off-side and cros
full_text: Chameera to Craig Williams, 1 run, back of a length on off, Williams drops it with soft hands into the off-side and crosses over

full_text: Chameera to Zane Green, 1 run, delivery speared into the blockhole, Green jams it in front of mid-off and races to the other end

short_text: Chameera to Zane Green, 2 runs, short and at the body, Green gets inside the line and tucks it backward of square leg, q
full_text: Chameera to Zane Green, 2 runs, short and at the body, Green gets inside the line and tucks it backward of square leg, quick two

short_text: Chameera to Zane Green, no run, uhhh! Green is struggling with Chameera's pace. He has been hit for a second time on the
full_text: Chameera to Zane Green, no run, uhhh! Green is struggling with Chameera's pace. He has been hit for a second time on the helmet. 147kph short ball and Green is clearly late on the pull, he is beaten on the top-edge and the ball strikes the side of his helmet. Chameera checks on him and Green gives the thumbs up

short_text: Chameera to Zane Green, no run, almost played on. 143kph delivery around off, Green pushes and the ball rolls back past
full_text: Chameera to Zane Green, no run, almost played on. 143kph delivery around off, Green pushes and the ball rolls back past the stumps, it came off the toe-end

full_text: Chameera to Zane Green, no run, play and miss. Angled across the left hander, Green drives and is beaten on the outside edge. He seemed to be a bit late on the shot

full_text: M Theekshana to Craig Williams, no run, comes down the track and is struck on the pad first, there's a stifled appeal for LBW by Theekshana and others but umpire Holdstock is not interested. Williams was a long way down and that saved him

full_text: M Theekshana to Zane Green, 2 runs, off-break turns away from the southpaw, Green drives and the outside edge evades the slip fielder, two added

short_text: M Theekshana to Baard, Caught by Hasaranga!! Theekshana strikes with his first ball. Very poor from Baard. He had to hav
full_text: M Theekshana to Baard, Caught by Hasaranga!! Theekshana strikes with his first ball. Very poor from Baard. He had to have a sighter against the spinner but instead tries to hit him out of the park straightaway, but all he manages is to sky it straight back over the bowler, Hasaranga runs in from long-on and takes a good catch. Sri Lanka have their early wicket.

full_text: Chameera to Baard, 1 run, short of length outside off, Baard carves it away to third man

short_text: Chameera to Zane Green, leg byes, 1 run, ouch! That was quick. The speedgun has it at 135kph but it surely looked a lot
full_text: Chameera to Zane Green, leg byes, 1 run, ouch! That was quick. The speedgun has it at 135kph but it surely looked a lot quicker than that. Green takes his eyes off the short ball and is struck below the grill, the ball deflects to third man and Baard calls his partner through for the single

full_text: Chameera to Zane Green, no run, 144kph short of length delivery on off, Green dabs it to backward point

full_text: Chameera to Zane Green, , 147kph delivery wasted down leg, Green fails to get anything on the glance and Perera dives to his right to glove the ball

full_text: Chameera to Baard, 1 run, shortens the length around off, Baard arches back and steers to third man

full_text: Chameera to Baard, , crunched! That should give him confidence. Not a bad delivery by Chameera. On a length and around off, Baard leans into the drive and meets it on the rise, creams it through extra cover and there's no need to run for that

full_text: Chameera to Baard, no run, even Chameera is getting some swing. Fullish and outside off, Baard is drawn into the drive and is beaten on the outside edge

full_text: Karunaratne to Baard, no run, now some extra bounce. The surface showing it is not going to be easy. Short of length and Baard goes for the cut, but the ball keeps climbing and beats the top-edge. He has a look at where the ball landed

full_text: Karunaratne to Baard, , tries the inswinger and sprays it down leg, Perer had to dive across to make the stop. Saved four..

full_text: Karunaratne to Baard, no run, this one does not bounce as much as Baard expected, he slashes away from the body and the ball sneaks past the under-edge, barely carries through to Kusal Perera

short_text: Smit to Avishka Fernando, leg byes, , that's a decent comeback by Smit, but Sri Lanka get four leg byes. Avishka Fernand
full_text: Smit to Avishka Fernando, leg byes, , that's a decent comeback by Smit, but Sri Lanka get four leg byes. Avishka Fernando was trying to defend this length ball, but got beaten on his defence. Struck on the back pad and hang on! A terrible review as this was pitching way outside leg. Flicks the back pad and rolls down to the third man boundary as they get four extras

full_text: Smit to Avishka Fernando, no run, tad shorter on off, Avishka Fernando defends it off his back foot to cover

full_text: Smit to Avishka Fernando, , lovely shot by Avishka Fernando! Walks down the track and flicks this over deep mid-wicket as he clears the boundary with ease. All about timing was that shot

short_text: Smit to Chandimal, Caught by Zane Green!! Smit strikes on his first ball. A short of a length delivery outside off and C
full_text: Smit to Chandimal, Caught by Zane Green!! Smit strikes on his first ball. A short of a length delivery outside off and Chandimal gets a nick as he attempts a cut. The keeper was confident and so was the bowler. The batsman starts walking off as he knew there was a clear sound. Sri Lanka are three down, this is getting interesting. Need to bat sensibly from here, else the match can turn on its head in no time!

full_text: Scholtz to Nissanka, Lbw!! Goes full does Scholtz and the ball drifts in to an extent. Keeps a touch low and strikes him on the pads as Nissanka gets beaten on his flick. Impact on off and the angle means this was sliding on to crash into middle and off. Sri Lanka have lost one review, with one to go..

full_text: Ruben Trumpelmann to Kusal Perera, Caught by Smit!! A slower delivery by Ruben Trumpelmann and Kusal Perera has been caught at mid-off.
